title: Sprig Signal School
objective: Keep the classroom sprig growing through a 3-minute lesson by tapping only the currently valid symbols in a crowded garden of drifting code leaves, while surviving rule flips between teaching and debugging.

controls.input: Tap a glowing lesson leaf or bug weed
controls.outcome: Scores points, grows the sprig, and builds combo if it matches the current lesson rule.

controls.input: Do not tap decoy leaves, stale lessons, or neutral petals
controls.outcome: Avoids strikes and preserves your multiplier.

controls.input: Watch the top lesson banner and listen for the mode cue
controls.outcome: Switches your priority instantly between teaching symbols and debugging weeds.

steps: A large lesson card at the top clearly shows the current goal, such as 'TEACH: LOOP leaf' or 'DEBUG: broken JUMP weed'.
Crowded waves of leaves, weeds, and petals drift inward from the edges, but only valid targets get a bright outline and matching sound ping.
Tap correct targets in a row to raise a Focus multiplier from 1x to 4x as the sprig glows and the music layers up.
Every few seconds the Lesson Bell rings and flips the rule: teaching mode wants healthy code leaves, debugging mode wants red bug weeds tied
Later waves mix near-matches, mirrored symbols, and double lessons, forcing faster reads without changing the tap-only control scheme.
Three mistakes or missed critical targets wilt the sprig and end the run.
scoring: Correct taps score base points plus a Focus multiplier that increases with streaks; rule-flip targets are worth bonus points for quick reaction. Final score is saved locally for an offline-friendly best-score leaderboard
tips: Read the giant lesson card first; the scene is noise, the banner is truth.
Use audio: a bright bell means teach mode, a harsh buzz means debug mode.
Protect the combo by skipping doubtful targets; one bad tap is worse than one missed small target.
Rule flips happen often, so recenter on the sprig after every bell instead of chasing the last cluster.

trendContext.title: sprig 🍃 Learn to code by making games in a JavaScript web-based game editor.
